channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Why did the elephants get kicked out of the pool?
item.description:
Why did the elephants get kicked out of the pool?
They kept dropping their trunks.

item.title: What's the best kind of sandwich for the beach?
item.description:
What's the best kind of sandwich for the beach?
Peanut butter and jellyfish.

item.title: What does a mermaid use to call her friends?
item.description:
What does a mermaid use to call her friends?
A shell phone, of course.

item.title: What did the beach say to the tide when it came in?
item.description:
What did the beach say to the tide when it came in?
Long time, no sea.

item.title: Where do sheep go on vacation?
item.description:
Where do sheep go on vacation?
The Baaaa-hamaaas.

item.title: Did you hear about the red ship and the blue ship that collided?
item.description:
Did you hear about the red ship and the blue ship that collided?
The sailors were marooned.

item.title: What kind of flower has never been put in a vase?
item.description:
What kind of flower has never been put in a vase?
A cauliflower!

item.title: What did bacon say to tomato?
item.description:
What did bacon say to tomato?
Lettuce get together!

item.title: What is the worst thing about being an octopus?
item.description:
What is the worst thing about being an octopus?
Washing your hands!

item.title: What button is impossible to unbutton?
item.description:
What button is impossible to unbutton?
A belly button!
